author: @emilyluzier

text: My theory on this surrealist YouTube Poop is that the King has been learning how to create copies of himself that can best be described as tulpas. He hasn’t quite perfected this method yet, which is why most of the copies take on bizarre qualities (garbled speech, teleportation, distorted proportions and colors, body part replication, and some other forms of reality bending). In my opinion, this is evidenced by the sequence at 0:11. We see the real King (pictured right) as he’s just finishing manifesting a new tulpa (pictured left). As it comes into existence, it’s at first in an ethereal jelly-like form as it attempts to replicate the King’s speech. Then it solidifies into a more accurate, tangible copy of the King. When the the camera angle reverses to see the real King speak to his creation, we are seeing and hearing the real King through the newborn tulpa’s point of view. The tulpa has only been alive for a few seconds so it cannot yet fully comprehend what it is seeing and hearing. The newborn tulpa’s disoriented state is represented by having the real King’s speech and face distorted. At the end, we see the real King once again who has had enough practice for the day. He attempts to “scrub” away this failed mind-experiment and we see everything fade. The broken mirror in the background just before everything fades away could be symbolism of the King’s failed attempts at creating new beings in his image; they were all broken. It seems the tulpas have now taken on a life of their own, independent of the King’s will, as we see two more King copies emerge from the darkness in the very last clip.

text:
The King has ascended to become a fourth-dimensional-being, capable of moving through time as it were another spatial direction and able to see all, from every perspective all at once, a vision in true 3-D, not the false perception we push as it. The King has come to know infinity.

Yet, to us feeble three-dimensional-beings, we perceive merely a slice, a snapshot of the majesty of His true form, as we see it stretched out across the entire universe. Our minds cannot comprehend the wisdom he beholds to us, as it is as if we tried to describe a sphere to a creature in a 2-D plane. The King is trapped within a Library of Babel winding from end to end across all space and time that ever has or ever shall be of his own design, never to commune with his own world again.

That's my take on this anyway. Funny shit.
